item.title: Remove extraneous npm dependencies
item.intent: No unused packages in package.json. npm install size is minimal.
item.description: package.json includes several unused packages: @emnapi/core, @emnapi/runtime, @emnapi/wasi-threads, @tybys/wasm-util, tslib. These are not imported anywhere in the codebase and add unnecessary install weight. Steps: (1) verify each package is unused via grep; (2) npm uninstall each confirmed-unused package; (3) run tests to confirm nothing breaks. Low-risk cleanup.
